log_forwarder.description: List of encryption types to block on the bucket (e.g. `["SSE-C"]`). Set to `[]` to block none. Defaults to blocking SSE-C, matching AWS's own default enforcement direction for new buckets, so the attribute doesn't drift against the provider's returned state on every plan
log_forwarder.name: bucket_blocked_encryption_types

root.description: Controls whether an S3 artifact bucket should be created. this is used for the zip archive as well as caching tags
root.name: create_bucket

root.description: Log forwarder lambda name

root.description: The AWS KMS Key ARN to use for CloudWatch log group encryption
root.name: log_forwarder_log_kms_key_id

root.description: IAM role arn for RDS enhanced monitoring forwarder lambda function to utilize

root.description: Controls whether a log forwarder endpoint should be created
root.name: create_log_forwarder_vpce

root.description: Controls whether a processes endpoint should be created
root.name: create_processes_vpce

root.description: Whether to publish creation/change as a new fambda function Version
root.name: rds_em_forwarder_publish

root.description: List of subnet ids when forwarder lambda function should run in the VPC. Usually private or intra subnets
root.name: vpc_fl_forwarder_subnet_ids

root.description: Alias of KMS key used to encrypt the Datadog API keys - must start with `alias/`
root.name: kms_alias

root.description: List of encryption types to block on the bucket (e.g. `["SSE-C"]`). Set to `[]` to block none. Defaults to blocking SSE-C, matching AWS's own default enforcement direction for new buckets, so the attribute doesn't drift against the provider's returned state on every plan
root.name: bucket_blocked_encryption_types

root.description: Controls whether an IAM role is created for the log forwarder
root.name: create_log_forwarder_role

root.description: The ARN of the policy that is used to set the permissions boundary for the log forwarder role
root.name: log_forwarder_role_permissions_boundary

root.description: A map of tags to apply to the log forwarder role
root.name: log_forwarder_role_tags

root.description: Whether to use unique name beginning with the specified `policy_name` for the log forwarder policy
root.name: log_forwarder_use_policy_name_prefix

root.description: Memory size for the RDS enhanced monitoring forwarder lambda function
root.name: rds_em_forwarder_memory_size

root.description: ID of VPC to provision endpoints within
root.name: vpc_id

root.description: Instruction set architecture for your Lambda function. Valid values are `["x86_64"]` and `["arm64"]`. Default is `["arm64"]`
root.name: log_forwarder_architectures

root.description: S3 object key prefix to prepend to zip archive name
root.name: log_forwarder_bucket_prefix

root.description: IDs of subnets to associate with traces endpoint
root.name: traces_vpce_subnet_ids

root.description: Log forwarder role name
root.name: log_forwarder_role_name

root.description: List of Lambda Layer Version ARNs (maximum of 5) to attach to the VPC flow log forwarder lambda
root.name: vpc_fl_forwarder_layers

root.description: A map of tags to apply to the VPC flow log forwarder lambda function
root.name: vpc_fl_forwarder_lambda_tags

root.description: IDs of security groups to attach to metrics endpoint
root.name: metrics_vpce_security_group_ids

root.description: Controls if S3 bucket should have deny non-SSL transport policy attacheds
root.name: bucket_attach_deny_insecure_transport_policy

root.description: Set to true to not merge `var.tags` with `log_forwarder_s3_zip_tags`. Useful to avoid breaching S3 Object 10 tag limit
root.name: log_forwarder_s3_zip_tags_only

root.description: Log forwarder policy name
root.name: log_forwarder_policy_name

root.description: Lambda function runtime
root.name: rds_em_forwarder_runtime

root.description: A map of tags to apply to the RDS enhanced monitoring forwarder resources
root.name: rds_em_forwarder_tags

root.description: The maximum session duration (in seconds) that you want to set for the specified role. If you do not specify a value for this setting, the default maximum of one hour is applied. This setting can have a value from 1 hour to 12 hours
root.name: vpc_fl_forwarder_role_max_session_duration
